pages.text: Enchanted books can no longer be applied to items in the $(#7A2FBF)anvil$(), since chiseled bookshelves are the intended way to use enchanted books.$(br2)You can still combine two tools in the anvil as usual.$(br2)$(italic)Strongly recommends Table Rework.$()

pages.title: Blocked Combination
pages.text: Combining a tool with an enchanted book in an anvil no longer works when this module is enabled.
